arts.ttl: West Ham register official interest in Man United star, two other transfer suitors in the race
arts.sum: West Ham United have reportedly been the first team to register an official interest in the potential transfer of Manchester United winger Antony. Real Betis and Olympique Marseille are also interested in the Brazilian wide-man, but it seems the Hammers may be leading the race for the moment. arts.ttl: Monaco submit second offer for West Ham star Edson Alvarez - after initial loan approach was rebuffed by the Hammers
arts.sum: SIMON JONES: Monaco have made a new proposal to West Ham for midfielder Edson Alvarez after their initial loan request was rejected for the Mexico international.

arts.ttl: Why the adaptable David Moyes is the stabilising force Everton need
arts.sum: Back at Goodison Park 11-and-a-half years after ending his highly successful first stint, the Scottish manager can restore the values that the club have lacked in his absence

arts.ttl: “Good step” | West Ham starlet speaks on his man of the match performance
arts.sum: West Ham starlet Oliver Scarles says he is “grateful” for the faith Graham Potter has shown.
